channel.title: logging on Andy Ibanez
channel.description: Recent content in logging on Andy Ibanez

item.title: Introduction to Apple's Unified Logging System on iOS 14 in Swift
item.description: title: “Simpler File Encryption on iOS” date: 2020-08-19T07:00:00-04:00 originalDate: 2020-08-17T14:22:06-04:00 draft: false publishDate: 2020-08-19T07:00:00-04:00 It is no surprise that software tend to write logs to a local file as they execute. As events, errors, or exceptional situations occur, a lot of software takes note of them using a local logging solution. This is done because these practices can allow us to troubleshoot problems for our users, find bugs, and in general understand the behavior of our software in untested or lesser tested scenarios.
